            simp
          have h₃ : ( (∅ : Set ℝ).ncard : ℝ ) = 0 := by
            simp [Set.ncard_empty]
          norm_num [h₂, h₃]
    simpa [h₁] using h₁

trivial
  <;> aesop

have h₁ : x / 2 + x / 2 = x := by
    have h₂ : x % 2 = 0 ∨ x % 2 = 1 := by omega
    cases h₂ with
    | inl h₂ =>
      -- Case: x is even (x % 2 = 0)
      have h₃ : x % 2 = 0 := h₂
      have h₄ : x / 2 * 2 = x := by
        have h₅ : x % 2 = 0 := h₃
        have h₆ : x / 2 * 2 = x := by
          have h₇ : x = 2 * (x / 2) := by
            have h₈ := Nat.div_add_mod x 2
            have h₉ := Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num : 2 > 0)
            omega
          omega
        exact h₆
      have h₅ : x / 2 + x / 2 = x := by
        have h₆ : x / 2 + x / 2 = x / 2 * 2 := by ring
        rw [h₆]
        omega
      exact h₅
    | inr h₂ =>
      -- Case: x is odd (x % 2 = 1)
      have h₃ : x % 2 = 1 := h₂
      have h₄ : x / 2 * 2 + 1 = x := by
        have h₅ : x % 2 = 1 := h₃
        have h₆ : x / 2 * 2 + 1 = x := by
          have h₇ : x = 2 * (x / 2) + 1 := by
            have h₈ := Nat.div_add_mod x 2
            have h₉ := Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by norm_num : 2 > 0)
            omega
          omega
        exact h₆
      have h₅ : x / 2 + x / 2 = x := by
        have h₆ : x / 2 + x / 2 = x / 2 * 2 := by ring
        have h₇ : x / 2 * 2 = x - 1 := by
          have h₈ : x / 2 * 2 + 1 = x := h₄
          have h₉ : x ≥ 1 := by
            by_contra h
            have h₁₀ : x = 0 := by omega
            rw [h₁₀] at h₈
            omega
          omega
        have h₈ : x / 2 + x / 2 = x - 1 := by
          omega
        have h₉ : x - 1 + 1 = x := by
          have h₁₀ : x ≥ 1 := by
            by_contra h
            have h₁₁ : x = 0 := by omega
            rw [h₁₁] at h₄
            omega
          omega
        have h₁₀ : x / 2 + x / 2 = x := by
          omega
        exact h₁₀
      exact h₅
  exact h₁

have h : False := by sorry
  -- from here, anything follows
  exfalso
  exact h
rfl

have h : answer(sorry) = sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} := by
    trivial
  exact h

  <;>
  norm_num
  <;>

  have h₁ : answer(sorry) = sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} := by
    exfalso
